scripts.dev: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite-temp',{ recursive: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite',{ recursive: true });" && vite --configLoader runner
scripts.dev:local: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite-temp',{ recursive: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite',{ recursive: true });" && vite --configLoader runner --mode local
scripts.dev:web: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite-temp',{ recursive: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite',{ recursive: true });" && vite --configLoader runner --mode web
scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite-temp',{ recursive: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite',{ recursive: true });" && vite build --configLoader runner
scripts.build:web: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite-temp',{ recursive: true }); require('fs').mkdirSync('node_modules/.vite',{ recursive: true });" && vite build --configLoader runner --mode web
